title: polypogon pygmeus
intro: Polypogon pygmeus, also known as Dwarf Hairgrass or Small Hairgrass, is a small perennial grass native to Europe and Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antispasmodic properties, which help to soothe digestive issues and calm the nervous system. The plant's medicinal properties are attributed to its ability to reduce inflammation and promote wound healing, making it beneficial for treating various health issues such as digestive problems, menstrual cramps, and skin conditions. Polypogon pygmeus can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
